build.buildCommand: composer install --ignore-platform-reqs --optimize-autoloader --no-scripts --no-interaction && npm install && npm run build

deploy.startCommand: mkdir -p storage/framework/sessions storage/framework/views storage/framework/cache storage/logs bootstrap/cache storage/app/receipts && chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache && php artisan storage:link && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache && php artisan queue:work --sleep=3 --tries=3 --max-time=3600 & php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8000
